calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Rueppel, for Petitioner John Almonds
The Court inquired if counsel had any further support to show that this court in the appropriate venue for the relief sought. Mr. Ruepel stated that he had nothing to add, and if the Court was not satisfied that it had venue, the Petitioner would dismiss the petition and refile in Texas. The Court ordered the petition taken off calendar and dismissed without prejudice.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Rueppel for (petitioner) Wilfred Almonds.

The Court asked if the party felt this was the proper venue in light of the trust being administered from Texas, that the trust states "as long as the situs remains in California..." Mr. Rueppel stated that his client has not received notice that the situs has moved, that the property in the trust is in San Francisco, that there has been some litigation over it, that the interest in filing this petition is to find out what the trust assets are, that they had filed an ex parte petition for waiver of notice, that the notice was sent to the trustee's son who has let them know that the pleadings were received and that the trustee is not well. The Court stated that notice is not an issue and that there are no objections before us. Mr. Rueppel stated that venue is proper as there may still be assets here. The Court stated that it did not doubt the convenience but that venue in San Francisco is not appropriate, and that it is willing to continue the matter for fact establishment of facts or can take the matter off calendar. Mr. Rueppel requested a continuance to be able to establish facts.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
